turns.content: What brings you in today?
My lower back is killing me. I drive a delivery van all day and it just gets worse. Sometimes the pain shoots down my leg.
When did this start?
Few months back, I guess. It was just achy at first. Now it's bad every day.
Can you describe the pain or discomfort? Where exactly do you feel it?
It's a sharp ache right in my lower back, near my belt line. When it shoots down my leg, it's like a hot poker.
Have you had any fever or chills?
No. No fever or chills. Just the damn back pain.
What medications are you currently taking?
Just ibuprofen sometimes. That's it.
Do you have any chronic medical conditions?
High blood pressure. That's about it.
Are you allergic to any medications?
No, I'm not allergic to anything.
Have you tried anything to relieve the symptoms?
I take the ibuprofen when it gets real bad. Doesn't do much, honestly.
Does anything make it better or worse?
Sitting in the van makes it worse, no question. Stretching helps a little, but only when I get out and move around.
How has this been affecting your daily life?
It's making my job miserable. Hard to lift boxes and drive. Can't sleep through the night either.
Do you smoke or drink alcohol?
I smoke about half a pack a day. Drink a few beers after work most nights, nothing crazy.
Has anyone in your family had similar problems?
Don't think so. My dad had some back trouble but never really talked about it.
Have you experienced anything like this before?
Nope. Never this bad. Just the usual aches from getting older, I guess.
On a scale of 1 to 10, how would you rate what you're going through right now — physically, and also emotionally?
Physically? 4 out of 10. Emotionally? 3, maybe. It's wearing me down.
Is there anything else you think I should know?
That's about it. Just want to get this fixed so I can do my job. Sometimes my foot goes a little numb, but not always.
And how have you been coping with all of this?
I just push through it. Got bills to pay and deliveries to make. Not much else I can do.
And how have you been coping with all of this?
I already said I just push through it. But it's getting harder to ignore when I can't even get comfortable in bed.
And how have you been coping with all of this?
I told you, I just push through. Ain't got a choice. But it's wearing me down, especially when my leg goes numb.
And how have you been coping with all of this?
Look, I already told you—I push through it. But it's making me real short with people, and I'm not sleeping right. That's the truth.
And how have you been coping with all of this?
I already said I just deal with it. How many times you gonna ask me the same thing? Just tell me what's wrong and how to fix it.
